mapper.sql: p.id, p.board_id, b.slug AS board_slug, b.board_type, b.board_name, b.class_code, b.class_name, p.category_code, c.name AS category_name, p.user_id, p.author, p.title, p.content, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.pinned, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at
FROM posts p INNER JOIN boards b ON b.id = p.board_id INNER JOIN board_categories c ON c.board_type = b.board_type AND c.code = p.category_code
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE p.board_id = #{boardId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE'
AND p.category_code = #{categoryCode}
ORDER BY p.pinned DESC,
p.like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
p.view_count DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
p.comment_count DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
p.created_at DESC, p.id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT
WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1

SELECT
WHERE p.id = #{postId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( board_id, user_id, title, content, category_code, author, view_count, like_count, comment_count, pinned, status ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{categoryCode}, #{author}, 0, 0, 0, #{pinned}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET board_id = #{boardId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category_code = #{categoryCode}, pinned = #{pinned}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET status = 'DELETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE posts SET like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE posts SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_likes (post_id, user_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}) ON CONFLICT (post_id, user_id) DO NOTHING
